content.text:
Please paste or upload the rollout checklist. I don’t see it in your message.

I’ll identify the single highest-risk gap based on factors such as:

- irreversible or poorly tested data migrations
- missing rollback/restore path
- lack of staged rollout or blast-radius controls
- unverified monitoring, alerting, and ownership
- authentication/authorization or security-impacting changes
- dependency, capacity, or failover assumptions
- unclear go/no-go and incident-response criteria

If relevant, include the system type, expected traffic/blast radius, and whether the release includes schema or data changes.
